mano_cua.result_summary: SvelteKit文档站所有页面返回500 Internal Error。.svelte-kit/generated/nodes/1-4.js均为空文件，导致所有路由(/, /languages, /styles)无法渲染内容。侧边栏导航可见但主内容区全部500错误。LineNumbers组件Demo完全无法访问。应用处于不可用状态。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: All routes return 500 Internal Error because SvelteKit generated node files (1.js through 4.js) are all empty. The sidebar navigation renders but main content shows 500 error on every page. No LineNumbers demo accessible. Application is completely broken - empty generated JS files prevent any content rendering.
